name: Hexylresorcinol
description: Hexylresorcinol is a substituted dihydroxybenzene. It exhibits antiseptic, anthelmintic and local anaesthetic properties. It can be found in topical applications for minor skin infections and in oral solutions or throat lozenges for pain relief and first aid antiseptic.

interactions.name: Chloroquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Hexylresorcinol can be decreased when it is combined with Chloroquine.

interactions.name: Amodiaquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Hexylresorcinol can be decreased when it is combined with Amodiaquine.

interactions.name: Primaquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Hexylresorcinol can be decreased when it is combined with Primaquine.

interactions.name: Hydroxychloroquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Hexylresorcinol can be decreased when it is combined with Hydroxychloroquine.
